_meta.source: 2020 U.S. Religion Census (ASARB), Group Detail file, aggregated by religious family
_meta.notes: Each of the 372 individual religious bodies in the ASARB Group Detail file was classified into a RELTRAD-style family (evangelical, mainline, historically Black Protestant, Catholic, Mormon, Orthodox, Jehovah's Witness, other Christian, and non-Christian traditions), matching Pew's family scheme where possible. christian_adherent_pct sums every Christian family; evangelical_adherent_pct and catholic_adherent_pct are single families. All figures are % of county population who are formal congregational ADHERENTS (members + attendees + children on congregation rolls) — the same methodology as religion.adherence_pct, and NOT comparable to the self-identification-based religion.christian_pct / evangelical_pct / catholic_pct (Pew, state-level) elsewhere in this catalog. Summing all families for a county reproduces religion.adherence_pct for that county (verified against the independently-derived Summary file to within rounding). Classification of the ~110 smallest/most obscure bodies (each <0.1% of national adherents) involved some judgment calls; the ~60 largest bodies covering 98.8% of national adherents were classified with high confidence.
